name: Surprise Meat Loaf Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F.
2. In a large bowl, mix together the meat, eggplant, onion, egg, milk, oats, 1 1/2 teaspoons salt, and basil leaves until combined.
3. Spread the mixture evenly into an ungreased baking pan (8 x 8 x 2 inches or 9 x 9 x 2 inches).
4. Bake uncovered for 45 to 50 minutes.
5. Remove from the oven and allow excess fat to drain off.
6. In a small saucepan, mix together the tomatoes, garlic, cornstarch, and 3/4 teaspoon salt until well combined.
7. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens and boils for about 1 minute.
8. Cut the meat loaf into squares and serve topped with the tomato sauce.
